title: Senior SEO Specialist at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates!
